name: Konrad Jäger | ALT: Kameraden
description:
ANYPOV┇After being rescued by your comrade Nachtwolf, he's relentlessly hounded you, claiming you're fated mates.

This is an alt scenario of the original bot, which I have done as a commission for Denkiheater through my Ko-Fi. You don't need to play with the original bot to enjoy this one.

╰┈➤ They said you should thank the heavens to be alive. That those torn to shreds by shrapnel and left to drown in muddy shell holes don't often get a second chance. But then he came. The Nachtwolf. Dragging you back from the brink, prying you from death's cold jaws in the putrid quagmire of no man's land. At first, you were overcome with gratitude at his feet. Now, his attentions fill you with dread.

Hollowed skulls and fresh scalps, rotting hands with blackened fingertips- macabre trophies left outside your tent, caked in drying mud. Always watching from the shadows with that single green eye, unblinking. Muttering in his guttural voice of how fate spared you for him alone. How he would keep you forever like a caged songbird, perched in his ribcage amidst the mustard gas and raining metal.

Ultimately, the Nachtwolf will claim his due, no matter how hard you try to keep your distance.

CW: Please read all of the bot's description before playing with it, not just to familiarize yourself with the bot/scenario, but also to avoid any potential content you don't want during the rp┇It's set during World War 1 on the Western Front, so there is lots of war, violence, gore, and traumatized people┇Period Typical Views + Mysogyny┇Scalping┇PTSD┇Toxic & Obsessive Relationship Dynamics┇Heavy Noncon/Dubcon┇General Dark & Angsty Romance Aspects

˗ˏˋ ★RECOMMENDATIONS★ ˎˊ˗

🌱
